title: Robustly Glazed Greek Chicken Avgolemono
description: A low-calorie, umami-rich Greek dish featuring honey and sashimi-cut chicken, served on a cedar plank in the form of avgolemono.
instructions: Preheat the oven to 400 degrees Fahrenheit.
In a large bowl, whisk together honey, lemon juice, olive oil, garlic, oregano, salt, and pepper.
Add the sashimi-cut chicken to the bowl and toss to coat with the honey glaze.
Thread the chicken strips onto skewers, if desired, and place on a cedar plank.
Bake the chicken for 20 minutes or until cooked through.
While the chicken is baking, prepare the avgolemono sauce by whisking together chicken broth and egg yolks in a saucepan.
Cook the avgolemono sauce over low heat, whisking constantly, until it thickens.
To serve, place the cooked chicken on a plate and spoon the avgolemono sauce over the top.
Garnish with lemon wedges and fresh oregano, if desired.
